channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Thursday, July 9 (game #1627)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Thursday, July 9 (game #858)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Thursday, July 9 (game #1124)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: Lovable reportedly in talks to double its valuation to $13.2B
item.description: The $300 million round is expected to be led by Menlo Ventures, Sifted reported.

item.title: Can't afford a high-powered graphics card? This DIY engineer made his own GPU out of 8,192 RISC-V chips
item.description: DIYer bitluni has built his own 160-core GPU using RISC-V microcontrollers.

item.title: Meta is reportedly working on smart glasses that would be recording all the time
item.description: Meta might be the next company to make an always-on AI wearable. The company is working on prototype "super sensing" always-aware smart glasses that could continuously record audio and snap photos "every few seconds," according to the Financial Times. The wearer could then ask Meta AI about the captured audio and images. However, the images […]

item.title: PlayStation-owned Audeze has 'some potential game studio collaborations' in the works for its Maxwell 2 ReSkin earcup designs, as well as plans to bring it to other models
item.description: Audeze's Maxwell 2 ReSkin earcups could expand with gaming collaborations in the future, say the PlayStation-owned company

item.title: Quote of the day by former Nintendo President Satoru Iawata: 'It will require many years and months for the majority of video game purchases to become digital' — correctly predicting dominance of digital games today back in 2009
item.description: The then Nintendo President was on the money

item.title: SpaceX's Grok 4.5 launches at half the price of rivals — here's why that could rattle Anthropic and OpenAI
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX released Grok 4.5 on Wednesday, the first artificial intelligence model the company has trained specifically for coding and autonomous agents — and the first tangible product of its $60 billion acquisition of the AI coding startup Cursor, completed just weeks ago.The launch marks a pivotal test of the sprawling, vertically integrated AI empire Musk has assembled over the past six months, and of a strategy that bets developers care less about topping benchmark leaderboards than about speed, cost, and whether a model can actually do the work."Announcing Grok 4.5, our first mod...

item.title: Transfer files of any size for life for a one-time $80 through July 19
item.description: Get lifetime access to Transfr Pro and send unlimited files securely with real-time tracking for a one-time $79.97.

item.title: Elon Musk says X will DM you about posts that receive a Community Note
item.description: The social platform wants its crowd-sourced corrections to be harder to ignore.

item.title: Feds demand autonomous vehicle companies stop interfering with first responders
item.description: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration said emergency scenes are not "edge cases."

item.title: Justin Bieber is joining FIFA’s first-ever World Cup final halftime show
item.description: FIFA added Justin Bieber to the World Cup 2026 final halftime show lineup with Madonna, Shakira, BTS, Burna Boy, and Coldplay.

item.title: Judge approves $1.5 million SEC-Musk settlement over Twitter investment
item.description: The opinion says whether it's fair is 'for our citizenry to decide at the ballot box.'

item.title: Google saw record-breaking number of searches after Messi and Argentinas comeback World Cup win
item.description: Messi and Argentina's Round of 16 win at the World Cup broke a major Google Search record.

item.title: These are the 115 best Prime Day deals in Australia on day 3 — up to 76% off headphones, vacuums, air fryers and more
item.description: Amazon's biggest sale of the year is here with some of the best prices we've seen on Kindles, AirPods, vacuums, hairstylers and more.
